subject: [SDC]: Fix for TOSCA Template incorrect handling of Numeric Strings
commit_message:
[SDC]: Fix for TOSCA Template incorrect handling of Numeric Strings

- Fix to handle strings with numeric value to not strip leading zeroes
- Adding unit tests

Issue-ID: SDC-4820
Change-Id: Idccce9cc853cd26f19caa119210e0a31ce8ca1b0
Signed-off-by: ankita.singhal <ankita.singhal@t-systems.com>
